req.title: Lab order routing (audit)
req.statement: A clinician shall order a lab test; orders shall route to the patient's preferred lab when available. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.
error_pathways: fallback to default lab when preferred unavailable

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
# Pytest Tests for Lab Order Routing with Audit Events

```python
"""
Test Suite: Lab Order Routing with Audit Event Emission
Requirement: A clinician shall order a lab test; orders shall route to the
patient's preferred lab when available. An AuditEvent must be emitted
for every operation and tested end-to-end.

Standards: FHIR R4, HL7 audit logging conventions
"""

import uuid
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code assumed to live in src/)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class LabOrderStatus(str, Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    ROUTED = "routed"
    REJECTED = "rejected"
    FAILED = "failed"


class AuditEventAction(str, Enum):
    CREATE = "C"
    READ = "R"
    UPDATE = "U"
    DELETE = "D"
    EXECUTE = "E"


class AuditEventOutcome(str, Enum):
    SUCCESS = "0"
    MINOR_FAILURE = "4"
    SERIOUS_FAILURE = "8"
    MAJOR_FAILURE = "12"


@dataclass
class Patient:
    id: str
    name: str
    preferred_lab_id: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    id: str
    name: str
    role: str = "MD"


@dataclass
class Lab:
    id: str
    name: str
    active: bool = True
    supported_tests: list = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class LabTest:
    code: str
    display: str
    loinc_code: str


@dataclass
class LabOrder:
    id: str
    patient_id: str
    clinician_id: str
    test: LabTest
    status: LabOrderStatus = LabOrderStatus.PENDING
    routed_to_lab_id: Optional[str] = None
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    notes: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class AuditEvent:
    id: str
    action: AuditEventAction
    outcome: AuditEventOutcome
    recorded_at: datetime
    agent_id: str          # clinician / system
    patient_id: str
    resource_type: str
    resource_id: str
    description: str
    source_ip: Optional[str] = None
    additional_context: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Exceptions
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class LabOrderError(Exception):
    pass


class LabNotFoundError(LabOrderError):
    pass


class UnauthorizedClinicianError(LabOrderError):
    pass


class UnsupportedTestError(LabOrderError):
    pass


class AuditEmissionError(Exception):
    """Raised when audit event fails to emit (must never suppress order flow)."""
    pass


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Service interfaces (production code assumed to live in src/)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class LabOrderService:
    def __init__(self, lab_repo, order_repo, audit_service, routing_engine):
        self.lab_repo = lab_repo
        self.order_repo = order_repo
        self.audit_service = audit_service
        self.routing_engine = routing_engine

    async def create_and_route_order(
        self,
        clinician: Clinician,
        patient: Patient,
        test: LabTest,
        source_ip: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> LabOrder:
        order_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        order = LabOrder(
            id=order_id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            clinician_id=clinician.id,
            test=test,
        )

        try:
            # Step 1 – authorisation check
            await self._assert_clinician_authorized(clinician)

            # Step 2 – persist draft order
            await self.order_repo.save(order)

            # Step 3 – route to preferred / fallback lab
            target_lab = await self.routing_engine.resolve_lab(patient, test)
            order.routed_to_lab_id = target_lab.id
            order.status = LabOrderStatus.ROUTED
            await self.order_repo.update(order)

            # Step 4 – emit SUCCESS audit event
            await self.audit_service.emit(AuditEvent(
                id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
                action=AuditEventAction.CREATE,
                outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS,
                recorded_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
                agent_id=clinician.id,
                patient_id=patient.id,
                resource_type="LabOrder",
                resource_id=order.id,
                description=f"Lab order {order.id} routed to lab {target_lab.id}",
                source_ip=source_ip,
                additional_context={"lab_id": target_lab.id, "test_code": test.code},
            ))

            return order

        except (UnauthorizedClinicianError, UnsupportedTestError, LabNotFoundError) as exc:
            order.status = LabOrderStatus.REJECTED
            await self.order_repo.update(order)

            await self.audit_service.emit(AuditEvent(
                id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
                action=AuditEventAction.CREATE,
                outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SERIOUS_FAILURE,
                recorded_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
                agent_id=clinician.id,
                patient_id=patient.id,
                resource_type="LabOrder",
                resource_id=order.id,
                description=f"Lab order rejected: {exc}",
                source_ip=source_ip,
                additional_context={"error": str(exc)},
            ))
            raise

        except Exception as exc:
            order.status = LabOrderStatus.FAILED
            await self.order_repo.update(order)

            await self.audit_service.emit(AuditEvent(
                id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
                action=AuditEventAction.CREATE,
                outcome=AuditEventOutcome.MAJOR_FAILURE,
                recorded_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
                agent_id=clinician.id,
                patient_id=patient.id,
                resource_type="LabOrder",
                resource_id=order.id,
                description=f"Unexpected error during lab order: {exc}",
                source_ip=source_ip,
            ))
            raise

    async def _assert_clinician_authorized(self, clinician: Clinician):
        if clinician.role not in ("MD", "NP", "PA", "RN"):
            raise UnauthorizedClinicianError(
                f"Clinician {clinician.id} with role '{clinician.role}' is not authorized."
            )


class RoutingEngine:
    def __init__(self, lab_repo):
        self.lab_repo = lab_repo

    async def resolve_lab(self, patient: Patient, test: LabTest) -> Lab:
        # Preferred lab takes priority if it exists and supports the test
        if patient.preferred_lab_id:
            lab = await self.lab_repo.find_by_id(patient.preferred_lab_id)
            if lab and lab.active and test.code in lab.supported_tests:
                return lab

        # Fallback: any active lab that supports the test
        labs = await self.lab_repo.find_supporting_test(test.code)
        active = [l for l in labs if l.active]
        if not active:
            raise LabNotFoundError(f"No lab available for test '{test.code}'")
        return active[0]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

FIXED_TS = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)


@pytest.fixture
def clinician_md():
    return Clinician(id="cli-001", name="Dr. Alice Smith", role="MD")


@pytest.fixture
def clinician_np():
    return Clinician(id="cli-002", name="Nurse Pat Jones", role="NP")


@pytest.fixture
def clinician_unauthorized():
    return Clinician(id="cli-999", name="Bob Receptionist", role="RECEPTIONIST")


@pytest.fixture
def patient_with_preferred_lab():
    return Patient(id="pat-001", name="John Doe", preferred_lab_id="lab-preferred")


@pytest.fixture
def patient_without_preferred_lab():
    return Patient(id="pat-002", name="Jane Roe", preferred_lab_id=None)


@pytest.fixture
def cbc_test():
    return LabTest(code="CBC", display="Complete Blood Count", loinc_code="58410-2")


@pytest.fixture
def hba1c_test():
    return LabTest(code="HBA1C", display="Hemoglobin A1c", loinc_code="4548-4")


@pytest.fixture
def preferred_lab():
    return Lab(
        id="lab-preferred",
        name="Preferred Diagnostics Inc.",
        active=True,
        supported_tests=["CBC", "HBA1C", "LFT"],
    )


@pytest.fixture
def fallback_lab():
    return Lab(
        id="lab-fallback",
        name="General Lab Services",
        active=True,
        supported_tests=["CBC", "HBA1C"],
    )


@pytest.fixture
def inactive_lab():
    return Lab(id="lab-inactive", name="Old Lab", active=False, supported_tests=["CBC"])


@pytest.fixture
def mock_lab_repo(preferred_lab, fallback_lab):
    repo = AsyncMock()
    repo.find_by_id = AsyncMock(side_effect=lambda lid: {
        "lab-preferred": preferred_lab,
        "lab-fallback": fallback_lab,
    }.get(lid))
    repo.find_supporting_test = AsyncMock(return_value=[fallback_lab])
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_order_repo():
    repo = AsyncMock()
    repo.save = AsyncMock(return_value=None)
    repo.update = AsyncMock(return_value=None)
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_service():
    svc = AsyncMock()
    svc.emit = AsyncMock(return_value=None)
    return svc


@pytest.fixture
def routing_engine(mock_lab_repo):
    return RoutingEngine(lab_repo=mock_lab_repo)


@pytest.fixture
def lab_order_service(mock_lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, routing_engine):
    return LabOrderService(
        lab_repo=mock_lab_repo,
        order_repo=mock_order_repo,
        audit_service=mock_audit_service,
        routing_engine=routing_engine,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper assertions
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def assert_audit_emitted_with(mock_audit_service, *, action, outcome, agent_id, patient_id,
                               resource_type="LabOrder", description_contains=None):
    """Assert that audit_service.emit was called with matching fields."""
    assert mock_audit_service.emit.called, "audit_service.emit was never called"
    for call_args in mock_audit_service.emit.call_args_list:
        event: AuditEvent = call_args[0][0]
        if (
            event.action == action
            and event.outcome == outcome
            and event.agent_id == agent_id
            and event.patient_id == patient_id
            and event.resource_type == resource_type
        ):
            if description_contains:
                assert description_contains in event.description, (
                    f"Expected '{description_contains}' in audit description, "
                    f"got: '{event.description}'"
                )
            return  # found a matching event
    pytest.fail(
        f"No matching audit event found. Calls: "
        f"{[c[0][0] for c in mock_audit_service.emit.call_args_list]}"
    )


# ===========================================================================
# TEST CLASS 1 – Happy-path: order creation and routing
# ===========================================================================

class TestLabOrderCreation:

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_clinician_can_create_lab_order(
        self, lab_order_service, clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """A valid MD clinician can create a lab order successfully."""
        order = await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order is not None
        assert isinstance(order.id, str)
        assert order.patient_id == patient_with_preferred_lab.id
        assert order.clinician_id == clinician_md.id
        assert order.test == cbc_test

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_order_is_persisted_before_routing(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_order_repo, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """Order must be saved (draft) before routing occurs."""
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        mock_order_repo.save.assert_awaited_once()
        saved_order: LabOrder = mock_order_repo.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved_order.status == LabOrderStatus.PENDING

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_order_status_becomes_routed_on_success(
        self, lab_order_service, clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """Returned order must carry ROUTED status."""
        order = await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order.status == LabOrderStatus.ROUTED

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_order_has_routed_lab_id(
        self, lab_order_service, clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """Routed order must reference the target lab."""
        order = await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order.routed_to_lab_id is not None

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_order_repo_update_called_after_routing(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_order_repo, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """order_repo.update must be called so routed state is persisted."""
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        mock_order_repo.update.assert_awaited()
        updated_order: LabOrder = mock_order_repo.update.call_args[0][0]
        assert updated_order.status == LabOrderStatus.ROUTED

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("role", ["MD", "NP", "PA", "RN"])
    async def test_authorized_roles_can_create_orders(
        self, mock_lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service,
        routing_engine, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test, role
    ):
        """All clinically authorised roles must be able to place orders."""
        clinician = Clinician(id=f"cli-{role}", name=f"Test {role}", role=role)
        service = LabOrderService(mock_lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, routing_engine)
        order = await service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order.status == LabOrderStatus.ROUTED


# ===========================================================================
# TEST CLASS 2 – Lab routing logic
# ===========================================================================

class TestLabRouting:

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_routes_to_preferred_lab_when_available(
        self, lab_order_service, clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab,
        cbc_test, preferred_lab
    ):
        """Patient's preferred lab is used when it is active and supports the test."""
        order = await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order.routed_to_lab_id == preferred_lab.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_falls_back_when_no_preferred_lab_set(
        self, lab_order_service, clinician_md, patient_without_preferred_lab,
        cbc_test, fallback_lab
    ):
        """When patient has no preferred lab, a capable fallback lab is used."""
        order = await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_without_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order.routed_to_lab_id == fallback_lab.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_falls_back_when_preferred_lab_inactive(
        self, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test, inactive_lab, fallback_lab
    ):
        """Inactive preferred lab is skipped; fallback is used instead."""
        lab_repo = AsyncMock()
        lab_repo.find_by_id = AsyncMock(return_value=inactive_lab)  # preferred is inactive
        lab_repo.find_supporting_test = AsyncMock(return_value=[fallback_lab])
        engine = RoutingEngine(lab_repo)
        service = LabOrderService(lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, engine)

        order = await service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert order.routed_to_lab_id == fallback_lab.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_falls_back_when_preferred_lab_doesnt_support_test(
        self, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, fallback_lab
    ):
        """Preferred lab that doesn't support the ordered test triggers fallback."""
        rare_test = LabTest(code="RARE_GENE", display="Rare Gene Panel", loinc_code="99999-0")
        preferred = Lab(id="lab-preferred", name="Preferred", active=True,
                        supported_tests=["CBC"])  # does NOT support RARE_GENE
        fallback = Lab(id="lab-fallback", name="Fallback", active=True,
                       supported_tests=["RARE_GENE"])

        lab_repo = AsyncMock()
        lab_repo.find_by_id = AsyncMock(return_value=preferred)
        lab_repo.find_supporting_test = AsyncMock(return_value=[fallback])
        engine = RoutingEngine(lab_repo)
        service = LabOrderService(lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, engine)

        order = await service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, rare_test
        )
        assert order.routed_to_lab_id == fallback.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_raises_when_no_lab_supports_test(
        self, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_without_preferred_lab
    ):
        """LabNotFoundError is raised when no lab can fulfil the test."""
        rare_test = LabTest(code="NO_LAB_TEST", display="Unsupported Test", loinc_code="00000-0")
        lab_repo = AsyncMock()
        lab_repo.find_by_id = AsyncMock(return_value=None)
        lab_repo.find_supporting_test = AsyncMock(return_value=[])  # nothing available
        engine = RoutingEngine(lab_repo)
        service = LabOrderService(lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, engine)

        with pytest.raises(LabNotFoundError):
            await service.create_and_route_order(
                clinician_md, patient_without_preferred_lab, rare_test
            )

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_preferred_lab_checked_before_fallback(
        self, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test, preferred_lab, fallback_lab
    ):
        """RoutingEngine must query preferred lab first (ordering check)."""
        lab_repo = AsyncMock()
        lab_repo.find_by_id = AsyncMock(return_value=preferred_lab)
        lab_repo.find_supporting_test = AsyncMock(return_value=[fallback_lab])
        engine = RoutingEngine(lab_repo)
        service = LabOrderService(lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, engine)

        order = await service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )

        # Preferred was queried
        lab_repo.find_by_id.assert_awaited_with(patient_with_preferred_lab.preferred_lab_id)
        # Fallback was NOT queried because preferred was suitable
        lab_repo.find_supporting_test.assert_not_awaited()
        assert order.routed_to_lab_id == preferred_lab.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_routing_engine_resolve_returns_lab_object(
        self, routing_engine, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test, preferred_lab
    ):
        """RoutingEngine.resolve_lab must return a Lab domain object."""
        lab = await routing_engine.resolve_lab(patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test)
        assert isinstance(lab, Lab)
        assert lab.id == preferred_lab.id


# ===========================================================================
# TEST CLASS 3 – Audit event emission (happy path)
# ===========================================================================

class TestAuditEventEmissionHappyPath:

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_emitted_on_successful_order(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """Exactly one audit event is emitted for a successful order."""
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        mock_audit_service.emit.assert_awaited_once()

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_action_is_create(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.action == AuditEventAction.CREATE

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_outcome_success_on_happy_path(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.outcome == AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_agent_is_clinician(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.agent_id == clinician_md.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_references_correct_patient(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.patient_id == patient_with_preferred_lab.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_resource_type_is_lab_order(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.resource_type == "LabOrder"

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_resource_id_matches_order_id(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        order = await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.resource_id == order.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_has_unique_id(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.id is not None
        assert len(event.id) > 0

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_has_recorded_timestamp(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        before = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        after = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert before <= event.recorded_at <= after

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_context_contains_target_lab_id(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test, preferred_lab
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.additional_context.get("lab_id") == preferred_lab.id

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_context_contains_test_code(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.additional_context.get("test_code") == cbc_test.code

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_event_description_mentions_target_lab(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test, preferred_lab
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
        )
        assert_audit_emitted_with(
            mock_audit_service,
            action=AuditEventAction.CREATE,
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS,
            agent_id=clinician_md.id,
            patient_id=patient_with_preferred_lab.id,
            description_contains=preferred_lab.id,
        )

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_source_ip_captured_in_audit_event(
        self, lab_order_service, mock_audit_service, clinician_md,
        patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        await lab_order_service.create_and_route_order(
            clinician_md, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test,
            source_ip="192.168.1.100"
        )
        event: AuditEvent = mock_audit_service.emit.call_args[0][0]
        assert event.source_ip == "192.168.1.100"


# ===========================================================================
# TEST CLASS 4 – Audit event emission (error paths)
# ===========================================================================

class TestAuditEventEmissionErrorPaths:

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_audit_emitted_on_unauthorized_clinician(
        self, mock_lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service,
        routing_engine, clinician_unauthorized, patient_with_preferred_lab, cbc_test
    ):
        """Audit event with SERIOUS_FAILURE emitted when clinician is unauthorized."""
        service = LabOrderService(mock_lab_repo, mock_order_repo, mock_audit_service, routing_engine)

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedClinicianError):
            await service.create

# Pytest Tests for Lab Order Routing with Audit Events

```python
"""
Test Suite: Lab Order Routing with Audit Event Emission
Requirement: A clinician shall order a lab test; orders shall route to the
patient's preferred lab when available. An AuditEvent must be emitted
for every operation and tested end-to-end.

Standards: FHIR R4, HL7 audit logging conventions
"""

import uuid
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code assumed to live in src/)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class LabOrderStatus(str, Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    ROUTED = "routed"
    REJECTED = "rejected"
    FAILED = "failed"


class AuditEventAction(str, Enum):
    CREATE = "C"
    READ = "R"
    UPDATE = "U"
    DELETE = "D"
    EXECUTE = "E"


class AuditEventOutcome(str, Enum):
    SUCCESS = "0"
    MINOR_FAILURE = "4"
    SERIOUS_FAILURE = "8"
    MAJOR_FAILURE = "12"


@dataclass
class Patient:
    id: str
    name: str
    preferred_lab_id: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    id: str
    name: str
    role: str = "MD"


@dataclass
class Lab:
    id: str
    name: str
    active: bool = True
    supported_tests: list = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class LabTest:
    code: str
    display: str
    loinc_code: str


@dataclass
class LabOrder:
    id: str
    patient_id: str
    clinician_id: str
    test: LabTest
    status: LabOrderStatus = LabOrderStatus.PENDING
    routed_to_lab_id: Optional[str] = None
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    notes: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class AuditEvent:
    id: str
    action: AuditEventAction
    outcome: AuditEventOutcome
    recorded_at: datetime
    agent_id: str          # clinician / system
    patient_id: str
    resource_type: str
    resource_id: str
    description: str
    source_ip: Optional[str] = None
    additional_context: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Exceptions
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class LabOrderError(Exception):
    pass


class LabNotFoundError(LabOrderError):
    pass


class UnauthorizedClinicianError(LabOrderError):
    pass


class UnsupportedTestError(LabOrderError):
    pass


class AuditEmissionError(Exception):
    """Raised when audit event fails to emit (must never suppress order flow)."""
    pass


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Service interfaces (production code assumed to live in src/)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class LabOrderService:
    def __init__(self, lab_repo, order_repo, audit_service, routing_engine):
        self.lab_repo = lab_repo
        self.order_repo = order_repo
        self.audit_service = audit_service
        self.routing_engine = routing_engine

    async def create_and_route_order(
        self,
        clinician: Clinician,
        patient: Patient,
        test: LabTest,
        source_ip: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> LabOrder:
        order_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        order = LabOrder(
            id=order_id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            clinician_id=clinician.id,
            test=test,
        )

        try:
            # Step 1 – authorisation check
            await self._assert_clinician_authorized(clinician)

            # Step 2 – persist draft order
            await self.order_repo.save(order)

            # Step 3 – route to preferred / fallback lab
            target_lab = await self.routing_engine.resolve_lab(patient, test)
            order.routed_to_lab_id = target_
